question.label: Next-quarter owning
question.name: You said 'not sure what I am owning next quarter' — what's most unclear?
question.description: Drills into the ownership uncertainty she just named so the specific clarity gap is visible.

answer: I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.

assessment.note: She answered a clarity probe with a sustained stuckness signal — doing similar work for months implies unclear forward ownership and also hints at growth stagnation.

new_queue.label: Unblocked next step
new_queue.name: What support from me would make your next ownership easier?

new_queue.label: Close-out focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
